title: Remove, repair and refit bicycle tyres
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Remove, repair and refit bicycle tyres demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to remove, repair and refit bicycle tyres

pcs.text: Determine job requirements from workplace instructions and customer requirements1.2 Source and interpret bicycle rim types and tyre manufacturer specifications and fitting instructions 1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.4 Select and check tools and equipment for serviceability1.5 Prepare work area and plan work to avoid damage to bicycle, minimise waste, and use time efficiently
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions and customer requirements1.2 Source and interpret bicycle rim types and tyre manufacturer specifications and fitting instructions 1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.4 Select and check tools and equipment for serviceability1.5 Prepare work area and plan work to avoid damage to bicycle, minimise waste, and use time efficiently?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions and customer requirements1.2 Source and interpret bicycle rim types and tyre manufacturer specifications and fitting instructions 1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.4 Select and check tools and equipment for serviceability1.5 Prepare work area and plan work to avoid damage to bicycle, minimise waste, and use time efficiently.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to remove, repair and refit bicycle tyres

elements.title: Carry out removal, repair and refitting of bicycle tyres

pcs.text: Identify and confirm repair options and techniques 2.2 Carry out removal, repair, refitting and testing of bicycle tyre and tube according to safety and environmental requirements2.3 Remove, repair, refit and inflate tyres and tubes without causing damage to bicycle or wheels2.4 Check refitted bicycle tyres and tube against customer requirements and test according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and confirm repair options and techniques 2.2 Carry out removal, repair, refitting and testing of bicycle tyre and tube according to safety and environmental requirements2.3 Remove, repair, refit and inflate tyres and tubes without causing damage to bicycle or wheels2.4 Check refitted bicycle tyres and tube against customer requirements and test according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and confirm repair options and techniques 2.2 Carry out removal, repair, refitting and testing of bicycle tyre and tube according to safety and environmental requirements2.3 Remove, repair, refit and inflate tyres and tubes without causing damage to bicycle or wheels2.4 Check refitted bicycle tyres and tube against customer requirements and test according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Carry out removal, repair and refitting of bicycle tyres

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm bicycle is ready for use 3.2 Report problems outside own area of responsibility to required person3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
